banner.title: Exclusive for PRO
banner.default: Unlock AI-powered features and premium tools.

onboarding.tagline: Get set up in a minute

actions.skipHint: You can skip this tutorial anytime.

notifications.title: Heads-up before it expires
notifications.description: We notify you when something is about to expire or runs out.

seed.title: What do you have in your pantry?
seed.description: Tap what you already have. You can edit quantities later. You can skip this step.

confirm.title: Your pantry is ready 👌
confirm.description: We've added your selection to your pantry.
confirm.descriptionEmpty: You can add your products whenever you want.
confirm.emptyBody: Add them one by one from your pantry.
confirm.adjustHint: Adjust dates and quantities later in your pantry.

selects.noOptions: No options configured. Type to create one or add it in Settings.

generic.title: Nothing to show
generic.subtitle: Adjust filters or add a product to get started.

pantry.title: Pantry is empty
pantry.subtitle:
Add products you want to track
(with quantity and expiry)

dashboard.title: Home

empty.title: Nothing here yet
empty.subtitle: Add products from the Pantry tab to see your summary, alerts, and suggestions here.

dashboard.confirmDeleteExpired: This will delete all expired products. Continue?

critical.title: Your pantry needs attention
critical.description: There are products that require immediate action

attention.title: Check your pantry soon
attention.trackingDescription: Many products don't have tracking dates

optimal.controlledDescription: You have products with no recent activity

reason.expiringsoon: Expiring very soon — use it today
reason.expirestoday: Expiring soon — start thinking about using it
reason.lowstock: Running low — add it to your shopping list
reason.expiringlater: Expiring in the coming days — start thinking about using it
reason.reviewExpiry: Past best before — use it today

success.title: Ingredients used
success.itemSaved: Great! You used {{name}} before it expired.

allGood.title: All under control
allGood.hint: Nothing urgent today — your pantry is in great shape
allGood.missingDates: {{count}} products without expiry date · add them to see suggestions

nearExpiry.title: Products expiring soon
nearExpiry.description: {{ count }} products expire in {{ days }} days

stale.title: Products with no activity
stale.description: {{ count }} products haven't moved in 30+ days

pantryScore.title: Pantry health
pantryScore.hint: Score based on expiry dates, stock and how your pantry is organized

foodCoverage.title: Estimated coverage
foodCoverage.hint: Estimate based on the products in your pantry

toasts.shoppingEmpty: All good — your shopping list is empty.
toasts.genericEmpty: All good — there are no items for that condition.

lowStock.title: Low stock alerts
lowStock.subtitle: At or below the minimum level
lowStock.empty: All items are above their minimum level.

suggestions.title: Shopping list
suggestions.empty: Mark products as "always keep at home" to get notified when they run low.

share.error: We couldn't share the shopping list.
share.dialogText: Share your grocery list as a PDF.

manualAdd.inlineHint: Add a product to the list...

emptyState.autoHint: Out-of-stock items will appear here automatically.

toasts.ignored: {{name}} hidden for now — it will come back next time.

pendingProductUpdates.title: Pantry updates pending
pendingProductUpdates.description: There are a few products you could refresh. It’ll take less than a minute.

addExpiryDates.title: Add expiry dates to your items
addExpiryDates.description: Track what to use first and avoid unpleasant surprises in your pantry.

organizeWithCategories.title: Organize your pantry by category
organizeWithCategories.description: Group your products to find them faster and keep everything under control.

missingFoodType.title: Classify your food types
missingFoodType.description: Assign a food type to your items to get better insights and meal planning.

planAndSaveTime.title: Plan the week with AI
planAndSaveTime.description: With PRO, organize your weekly menu and save time every day.

pro.title: Smart AI analysis
pro.description: Detects patterns, predicts waste and gives personalised recommendations.

desc.review: Past date, may still be fine

fastAdd.title: Add products
fastAdd.subtitle: Search for an existing product or create a new one.

quantitySheet.hint: Adjust the quantity. It will be saved when closed.
quantitySheet.zeroHint: It'll disappear from your pantry until you restock it
quantitySheet.zeroHintBasic: It'll disappear from your pantry and show up in your shopping list

toasts.isBasicOn: Will be added to your list when it runs out
toasts.hiddenUntilStock: It will be hidden until you add stock again.

consume.title: Consume products
consume.subtitle: Search for products to deduct from your pantry.

emptyState.title: Fresh items
emptyState.subtitle:
Add what you use every week
(no exact dates needed)

fresh.keepInStockHint: Will reappear when you mark it as out

addModal.title: New fresh
addModal.subtitle: Search for an existing fresh item or create a new one.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete product
deleteConfirm.message: Delete {{ name }}? This can't be undone.

dialog.title: Convert to fresh

empty.filters: No fresh products in this state.

toast.markedOutHint: Out of stock · Activate ⭐ to add it to your list
toast.keepInStock: Will be added to your list when you run out

upgrade.title: Upgrade to PRO
upgrade.headline: Unlock the full pantry superpowers
upgrade.subtitle: Smarter automation and priority features.

benefits.agent: Discover what expires most, what piles up, and how to improve your rotation. Concrete recommendations based on your own consumption history.

upgrade.note: Subscriptions are managed in the Google Play account screen.

errors.purchaseFailed: No subscription available right now. Try again or check your Play account.

plans.unavailable: No plans available right now. Check your connection or try again in a moment.

settings.title: Settings

pro.statusDescription: Thank you for supporting the project. PRO is active on this device.
pro.upgradePrompt: Upgrade to PRO to unlock your full history and premium features.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Pick the look that feels right.
appearance.description: Choose light, dark, or follow your device.

advanced.title: Data
advanced.subtitle: Backups and your pantry catalogs.
advanced.openSubtitle: Export your data or manage categories and locations.

data.title: Backup
data.subtitle: Export your data to save it or share it with someone else.
data.resetDescription: Removes all pantry items, history and settings from this device. Cannot be undone.
data.exportDescription: Creates a file with all your data. Save it, send it via WhatsApp or share it. If someone else opens it, PantryMind will load it automatically.
data.importDescription: Load data from a .json file. This will replace your current data.
data.syncNote: Want to share your pantry? Export the file and send it to the other person. When they open it, PantryMind will load it automatically.

reset.confirm:
This will delete all pantry items, history and settings from this device.

This action cannot be undone. Do you want to continue?

export.unavailable: Export is not available in this environment.
export.readyToShare: Your backup is ready to share.
export.shareText: Save or share your PantryMind backup.

import.confirm: This will replace all your current data with the selected file. Make sure it is the right backup. Continue?
import.error: Could not restore the backup. Check that the file is correct.
import.invalid: The selected file is not a valid backup.
import.empty: The file contains no data to restore.

settings.loadError: There was a problem loading settings.

catalogs.title: Catalogs
catalogs.subtitle: Manage the lists you use in the app.

locations.title: Locations
locations.subtitle: Customize locations available when creating or editing products.
locations.empty: Add a location to get started.
locations.removeInUseMessage: This location is used by {{ count }} products. Those products will lose this information.

categories.title: Categories
categories.subtitle: Define the categories available when adding products.
categories.empty: Add a category to get started.
categories.removeInUseMessage: This category is used by {{ count }} products. Those products will lose this information.

supermarkets.title: Supermarkets
supermarkets.subtitle: Choose which supermarkets appear when editing products.
supermarkets.empty: Add a supermarket to get started.
supermarkets.removeInUseMessage: This supermarket is used by {{ count }} products. Those products will lose this information.

dev.title: Developer
dev.subtitle: Tools for testing different scenarios.
dev.setupSubtitle: Open the setup flow to configure catalogs.
dev.resetOnboardingSubtitle: Mark onboarding as unseen for next launch
dev.testNotificationSubtitle: Fires in 5 seconds — background the app to see it
dev.scheduleAtTimeSubtitle: Schedule the notification for today at the chosen time
dev.previewNotificationSubtitle: See what would be scheduled with current data
dev.seedExpiredSubtitle: Add 3 items with past expiry dates
dev.seedLowStockSubtitle: Add 3 basic items below minimum threshold
dev.clearPantrySubtitle: Permanently delete every item in the pantry
dev.clearPantryConfirm: Delete all pantry items? This cannot be undone.
dev.notificationPreviewNone: No notification would be scheduled. Check that items and preferences match the notification criteria.
dev.languageSelectorSubtitle: Force UI language for screenshots without changing device settings
dev.seedMarketingSubtitle: Clear all data and seed realistic demo content for screenshots
dev.seedMarketingConfirm: This will delete all current data and replace it with the marketing dataset. Continue?

info.title: Information
info.subtitle: Version, ratings and support.
info.rateSubtitle: Enjoying PantryMind? Leave us a review.

notifications.subtitle: Configure when and what you want to be notified about.
notifications.openSubtitle: Expiry alerts, low stock and more.
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.enabledDescription: Receive a daily summary of your pantry status
notifications.expiredDescription: Alert when items in your pantry have expired
notifications.nearExpiryDescription: Alert when products are about to expire
notifications.lowStockDescription: Alert when essential products are running low
notifications.permissionDeniedMessage: It looks like you previously denied notification permission. To enable them again, go to your device Settings, find the app and turn on notifications from there.

reviews.prompt: If PantryMind is helping you, a review really helps us. Would you leave one?
reviews.promptHoy: You made the most of your ingredients before they expired. Would you help us with a review?

expired.title: You have expired items
expired.body: {{ count }} items in your pantry have expired
expired.body_one: An item in your pantry has expired

reEngagement.title: How are your fresh items doing?
reEngagement.body: It's been a few days since you checked the pantry. Just a moment to keep everything up to date.

weeklyReminder.title: What did you buy this week?
weeklyReminder.body: Add the new items to your pantry for accurate tracking

welcome.title: PantryMind is ready ✓
welcome.body: Notifications are working. Add your first product and we'll alert you before it expires.

sync.title: Shared pantry
sync.subtitle: Keep the pantry in sync with your partner or family.
sync.openSubtitle: Send or receive the full pantry from another device.

send.title: Send my pantry
send.subtitle: Transfer an exact copy of your pantry to the other device.
send.actionDescription: The share menu will open. Choose Nearby Share, WhatsApp or any other app.
send.shareText: Update the pantry on another device with PantryMind.

receive.title: Receive the pantry
receive.subtitle: No special setup needed on the other phone.
receive.howDescription: When you receive the file from the other device, just open it. PantryMind will detect it and ask if you want to update your pantry.

incoming.title: Pantry update
incoming.message: Another device wants to sync its pantry with yours. This will replace your current pantry with theirs. Do you want to apply it?

batchEdit.expiryDateHint: Only products with a single batch are shown.
